Y-Axis : Y axes parameters

# setMaxY
Set the maximum value for data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

setMaxY : null

setMaxY : 75


# setMinY
Set the minimum value for data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

setMinY : null

setMinY : 25


# setPanningMaxY
Set the maximum value allowed to pann the data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

setPanningMaxY : null

setPanningMaxY : 125


# setPanningMinY
Set the minimum value allowed to pann the data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

setPanningMinY : null

setPanningMinY : -5


# yAxis
Name of the samples, groups or variables to be displayed in the Y axis
Type: array
Default: []
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxis : ["Col2"]

yAxis : ["Col3", "Col4"]


# yAxis2Rotate
Flag to rotate 180 degrees the direction of the Y axis on the right
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxis2Show
Flag to show/hide the Y axis on the right
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxis2Show : true

yAxis2Show : false


# yAxis2Title
Y axis2 title on the right
Type: string
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxis2Title : "Custom Y2 Axis Title"

yAxis2Title : "Another Y2 Axis Title"


# yAxisCeilValue
Value to ceil the data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisCeilValue : 100

yAxisCeilValue : 50


# yAxisCurrent
Sample id that is currently displayed in the Y axis. Important when there are more that one series displayed in the graph
Type: integer
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisExact
Flag to force exact values in Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisFactorValue
Value to factor the data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisFactorValue : 1

yAxisFactorValue : 2


# yAxisFloorValue
Value to floor the data in the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisFloorValue : 0

yAxisFloorValue : 20


# yAxisGridMajorColor
Color for the major grid lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: color
Default: rgb(204, 204, 204)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMajorColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisGridMajorColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisGridMajorLineType
Type of line for the major grid lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: string
Default: solid
Options: rect, solid, spline, dotted, dashed, dotdash, longdash, twodash
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMajorLineType : "solid"

yAxisGridMajorLineType : "dashed"


# yAxisGridMajorShow
Flag to show/hide the major grid lines in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: true
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMajorShow : true

yAxisGridMajorShow : false


# yAxisGridMajorTransparency
Transparency for the color of the major grid lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisGridMajorWidth
Width for the major grid lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMajorWidth : 1

yAxisGridMajorWidth : 3


# yAxisGridMinorColor
Color for the minor grid lines in the Y axis
Type: color
Default: rgb(204, 204, 204)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMinorColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisGridMinorColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisGridMinorLineType
Type of line for the minor grid lines in the Y axis
Type: string
Default: solid
Options: rect, solid, spline, dotted, dashed, dotdash, longdash, twodash
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMinorLineType : "solid"

yAxisGridMinorLineType : "dashed"


# yAxisGridMinorShow
Flag to show/hide the minor grid lines in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: true
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMinorShow : true

yAxisGridMinorShow : false


# yAxisGridMinorTransparency
Transparency for the color of the minor grid lines in the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisGridMinorWidth
Width for the minor grid lines in the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 0.5
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisGridMinorWidth : 1

yAxisGridMinorWidth : 3


# yAxisHistogramHeight
Size in pixels for the histogram in the Y axis
Type: integer
Default: 80
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisHistogramHeight : 150

yAxisHistogramHeight : 200


# yAxisHistogramShow
Flag to show/hide the histogram in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisHistogramShow : true

yAxisHistogramShow : false


# yAxisLineLeftColor
Color for the left line across the Y axis
Type: color
Default: rgb(204, 204, 204)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineLeftColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisLineLeftColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisLineLeftLineType
Type of line for the left line across the Y axis
Type: string
Default: solid
Options: rect, solid, spline, dotted, dashed, dotdash, longdash, twodash
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineLeftLineType : "solid"

yAxisLineLeftLineType : "dashed"


# yAxisLineLeftShow
Flag to show/hide the line in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineLeftShow : true

yAxisLineLeftShow : false


# yAxisLineLeftTransparency
Transparency for the color of the left line across the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisLineLeftWidth
Width for the left line across the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineLeftWidth : 1

yAxisLineLeftWidth : 3


# yAxisLineRightColor
Color for the right line across the Y axis
Type: color
Default: rgb(204, 204, 204)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineRightColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisLineRightColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisLineRightLineType
Type of line for the right line across the Y axis
Type: string
Default: solid
Options: rect, solid, spline, dotted, dashed, dotdash, longdash, twodash
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineRightLineType : "solid"

yAxisLineRightLineType : "dashed"


# yAxisLineRightShow
Flag to show/hide the line in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineRightShow : true

yAxisLineRightShow : false


# yAxisLineRightTransparency
Transparency for the color of the right line across the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisLineRightWidth
Width for the right line across the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLineRightWidth : 1

yAxisLineRightWidth : 3


# yAxisLogTicksColor
Color for the log tick lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: color
Default: rgb(0,0,0)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLogTicksColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisLogTicksColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisLogTicksLength
Length for the log tick lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: float
Default: 8
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisLogTicksLineType
Type of line for the log tick lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: string
Default: solid
Options: rect, solid, spline, dotted, dashed, dotdash, longdash, twodash
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisLogTicksShow
Flag to show/hide the log tick lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLogTicksShow : true

yAxisLogTicksShow : false


# yAxisLogTicksTransparency
Transparency for the color of the log tick lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisLogTicksWidth
Width for the log tick lines in the Y axis on the left
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisLogTicksWidth : 1

yAxisLogTicksWidth : 3


# yAxisMinorTicks
Number of minor ticks between major ticks in the Y axis
Type: integer
Default: 2
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisMinorTicks : 2

yAxisMinorTicks : 5


# yAxisRugHeight
Size in pixels for the data rug in the Y axis
Type: integer
Default: 15
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisRugHeight : 25

yAxisRugHeight : 50


# yAxisRugPosition
Position for the data rug in theY axis
Type: string
Default: left
Options: left, rigth, both
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisRugPosition : "left"

yAxisRugPosition : "right"


# yAxisRugShow
Flag to show/hide a data rug in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisRugShow : true

yAxisRugShow : false


# yAxisSetMinorValues
Set the minor values for the axis in the Y axis
Type: array
Default: []
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisSetValues
Set the values for the axis in the Y axis
Type: array
Default: []
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisSetValues : [20, 40, 60]

yAxisSetValues : [10, 30, 50, 70]


# yAxisShow
Flag to show/hide the Y axis on the left
Type: boolean
Default: true
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisShow : true

yAxisShow : false


# yAxisTextColor
Color for the text in axis text
Type: color
Default: rgb(0,0,0)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTextColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisTextColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisTextFontSize
Font size for the text in axis text. Be aware that auto scaling font must be turned off for this property to take effect. A more convenient way to modify the size is to use the yAxisTextScaleFontFactor
Type: integer
Default: 8
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTextFontStyle
Font style for the axis text
Type: string
Default:
Options: , bold, italic, bold italic
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTextFontStyle : "bold"

yAxisTextFontStyle : "italic"


# yAxisTextMargin
Margin to pad or separate the characters in the axis text
Type: float
Default: 5
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTextMargin : 5

yAxisTextMargin : 25


# yAxisTextRotate
Rotation in degrees for the axis text
Type: integer
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTextScaleFontFactor
Scaling factor used to increase or decrease the axis text font size in the canvas
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTextScaleFontFactor : 0.5

yAxisTextScaleFontFactor : 1.2


# yAxisTickFormat
Y axis format for the tick values in the Y axis. It could be a string with the sprintf format or an array where the first parameter is the sprintf format and the second parameter is a modification applied to the value before is passed to the sprintf function, i.e. ("/1000", "+ 100", etc.)
Type: string
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTickFormat : "%.2f"

yAxisTickFormat : "%.1f"


# yAxisTicks
Approx number of tick lines in the Y axis
Type: integer
Default: 5
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTicks : 5

yAxisTicks : 10


# yAxisTicksColor
Color for the marker lines across the Y axis
Type: color
Default: rgb(204, 204, 204)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTicksColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisTicksColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisTicksLength
Length for the marker lines across the Y axis
Type: float
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTicksLength : 5

yAxisTicksLength : 20


# yAxisTicksLineType
Type of line for the marker lines across the Y axis
Type: string
Default: solid
Options: rect, solid, spline, dotted, dashed, dotdash, longdash, twodash
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTicksShow
Flag to show/hide the marker lines across the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: true
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTicksShow : true

yAxisTicksShow : false


# yAxisTicksTransparency
Transparency for the color of the marker lines across the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTicksWidth
Width for the marker lines across the Y axis
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTicksWidth : 1

yAxisTicksWidth : 3


# yAxisTime
Flag to force date format in Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTitle
Y axis title on the left
Type: string
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTitle : "Custom Y Axis Title"

yAxisTitle : "Another Y Axis Title"


# yAxisTitleAlign
Alignment (or position) for the axis title
Type: string
Default: center
Options: left, center, right
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTitleBaseline
Baseline (or reference line) for the axis title
Type: string
Default: middle
Options: top, middle, bottom
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTitleColor
Color for the text in axis title
Type: color
Default: rgb(0,0,0)
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTitleColor : "#9e0adb"

yAxisTitleColor : "#ff7d00"


# yAxisTitleDynamic
Set the title for the Y axis dynamically as it changes when configured by the user
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTitleFontSize
Font size for the text in axis title. Be aware that auto scaling font must be turned off for this property to take effect. A more convenient way to modify the size is to use the yAxisTitleScaleFontFactor
Type: integer
Default: 8
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTitleFontStyle
Font style for the axis title
Type: string
Default:
Options: , bold, italic, bold italic
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTitleFontStyle : "bold"

yAxisTitleFontStyle : "italic"


# yAxisTitleMargin
Margin to pad or separate the characters in the axis title
Type: float
Default: 5
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTitleMargin : 5

yAxisTitleMargin : 25


# yAxisTitleRotate
Rotation in degrees for the axis title
Type: integer
Default:
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

# yAxisTitleScaleFontFactor
Scaling factor used to increase or decrease the axis title font size in the canvas
Type: float
Default: 1
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTitleScaleFontFactor : 0.5

yAxisTitleScaleFontFactor : 1.2


# yAxisTransform
Type of transformation for values in Y axis
Type: string
Default:
Options: False, log2, log10, -log2, -log10, exp2, exp10, sqrt, percentile
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTransform : "log2"

yAxisTransform : "log10"


# yAxisTransformLinearTicks
Flag to transform the values of the ticks back to linear scale in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTransformLinearTicks : true

yAxisTransformLinearTicks : false


# yAxisTransformTicks
Flag to transform the values of the ticks in the Y axis
Type: boolean
Default: false
Used in: Contour, Density, Histogram, Scatter2D, Scatter3D, ScatterBubble2D, Streamgraph

yAxisTransformTicks : true

yAxisTransformTicks : false

CanvasXpress a stand-alone JavaScript Library for Data Analytics. Built for the purpose of reproducible research with a sophisticated and unobtrusive user interface. Full and effortless audit trail of data, configuration and all user interactions in every visualization.
